name: Ahmad Al-Salem

action: Schedule an immediate 1:1 check-in with Ahmad today or tomorrow to diagnose the root cause of the quiz failure (concept gaps, test anxiety, or study method issues) and create a targeted 6-day prep plan.
reasoning: Ahmad is at critical risk with a 78/100 risk score and 40/100 quiz failure, but his perfect attendance shows motivation and commitment.
